items.visual_description: A pair of wide-leg jeans made of light blue, acid-washed denim. They feature a standard five-pocket design, including a small coin pocket, belt loops around the waistband, and a button-front closure.

overall_description: A pair of vintage-style wide-leg jeans in a light blue acid wash. The jeans have a relaxed fit and are presented flat, highlighting their classic construction and faded denim texture.
